Content: All tax years with balance due | Total amount owed (access SUMRY) | Monthly income and expenses | Bank account for direct debit | Employer name and address

GUARANTEED: 10K or less, all returns filed - Fee $31 DD or $107 | STREAMLINED: 50K or less, 72-month payoff - Fee $31 DD or $107 | NON-STREAMLINED: Over 50K or 72+ months - Fee $107 + F433 | PPIA: Cannot full-pay in CSED - Requires F433-A

1. Verify ALL returns are filed (TXMODA) | 2. Calculate minimum: Balance divided by months to CSED | 3. Use Online Payment Agreement if eligible | 4. Set up direct debit to reduce fee | 5. Explain: Miss 2 payments equals default | 6. Document terms in AMS history

Props.Title: Required Fields
Props.Body: All tax years in agreement | Monthly payment amount | Payment due date (1st-28th) | Bank routing and account number | Verbal agreement to terms confirmed
